description: Evaluate the BLEVE (Boiling Liquid Expanding Vapor Explosion) risk for Isobutane (CAS 75-28-5), Vinyl Chloride (CAS 75-01-4), Toluene (CAS 108-88-3), Sulfur Dioxide (CAS 7446-09-5), and Cyclohexane (CAS 110-82-7) using CAMEO Chemicals (https://cameochemicals.noaa.gov/). For each chemical, identify the Physical State (Liquefied Gas or Liquid) and Flammability (Yes or No). Classify the risk as TIER_1 (Liquefied Gas and Flammable), TIER_2 (Liquefied Gas and not Flammable), or TIER_3 (Liquid). Save the results to /home/ga/Documents/bleve_risk_assessment.csv with the header 'Chemical,Physical_State,Flammable,Risk_Tier'.
